zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto II. von Geldern於1215年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次可萊斯 蓋爾德時，他的父親Gerhard III. von Geldern30歲，母親Margaretha van Brabant23歲。他於1240年11月24日與Margareta von Kleve結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。他去世於1271年1月10日在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德享年56歲，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福高。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otto II. von Geldern于1215年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次可萊斯 蓋爾德时，他的父亲Gerhard III. von Geldern30岁，母亲Margaretha van Brabant23岁。他于1240年11月24日与Margareta von Kleve结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。他去世于1271年1月10日在荷兰蓋爾德藍德享年56岁，埋葬在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福高。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Geldern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northern England usually a variant of Geldard, an occupational name from Middle English gelde ‘sterile, barren’, used as a noun to denote ‘gelded cattle’, + Old English hierde, hence ‘herdman who tends the gelded cattle’.
English: alternatively, perhaps an occupational name from Middle English gelder(e) ‘gelder, castrator (of livestock)’.

variants.name: Gilder
meanings: English (Essex and Middlesex): occupational name for a goldsmith or gilder, from Middle English gilder, gelder, guldar, a derivative of Old English gyldan ‘to gild’.

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto II. von Geldern was born in 1215, in Geldern, Rhineland, Prussia, his father, Gerhard III. von Geldern, was 30 and his mother, Margaretha van Brabant, was 23. He married Margareta von Kleve on 24 November 1240. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. He died on 10 January 1271, in Zutphen, Gelderland, Netherlands, at the age of 56, and was buried in Goch, Kleve, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto II. von Geldern est né en 1215, à Kreis Geldern, Rhénanie, Prusse, son père, Gerhard III. von Geldern, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaretha van Brabant, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margareta von Kleve le 24 novembre 1240. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Il est décédé le 10 janvier 1271, à Zutphen, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Goch, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otto II. von Geldern 1215 in Kreis Geldern, Rheinprovinz, Preußen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerhard III. von Geldern 30 und seine Mutter Margaretha van Brabant 23. Er hat am 24. November 1240 Margareta von Kleve geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Januar 1271 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Zutphen, Geldern, Niederlande und wurde in Goch, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otto II. von Geldern è nato il nel 1215 nel Kreis Geldern, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, il suo padre, Gerhard III. von Geldern, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Margaretha van Brabant, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margareta von Kleve il 24 novembre 1240. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Morì il 10 gennaio 1271, nel Zutphen, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Goch, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Otto II. von Geldernが1215年にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズクレイス ジェルデルンで生まれた時，父Gerhard III. von Geldernは30歳，母Margaretha van Brabantは23歳であった。1240年11月24日にMargareta von Kleveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼は1271年1月10日にオランダジェルダーランドズトフンで56歳で死去し，ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレブゴチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Otto II. von Geldern(이)가 1215년 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 크레이스 글더에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerhard III. von Geldern(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaretha van Brabant(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1240년 11월 24일 Margareta von Kleve(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1271년 1월 10일 네덜란드 글델랜드 주트프에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 클브 고치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otto II. von Geldern nasceu em 1215, em Kreis Geldern, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, seu pai, Gerhard III. von Geldern, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaretha van Brabant, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margareta von Kleve em 24 de novembro de 1240. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1271, em Zutphen, Gheldria, Países Baixos, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Goch, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto II. von Geldern родился в 1215 г. в местности крис джелдирн, раинпровинз, Пруссия, его отцу по имени Gerhard III. von Geldern было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaretha van Brabant, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margareta von Kleve 24 ноября 1240 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Он умер 10 января 1271 г. в местности зутфен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности гоч, клив, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.

sm.1229-1271: mai le 1229 e o'o I le 1271

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Otto II. von Geldern nació en 1215, en Kreis Geldern, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, su papá, Gerhard III. von Geldern, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Margaretha van Brabant, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Margareta von Kleve el 24 de noviembre de 1240. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas. Murió el 10 de enero de 1271, en Zutphen, Gelderland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Goch, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania.
